member.name: T:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.ActivityBaggageEnricher
member.summary: A log event enricher which adds baggage from the current .

member.name: M:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.ActivityBaggageEnricher.Enrich(Serilog.Events.LogEvent,Serilog.Core.ILogEventPropertyFactory)
member.summary: Enrich the log event.
member.param: Factory for creating new properties to add to the event.

member.name: T:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.ActivityEnricher
member.summary: A log event enricher which adds span information from the current .

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with default event properties names.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Enrich the log event.
member.param: Factory for creating new properties to add to the event.

member.name: T:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.ActivityExtensions
member.summary: extension methods.

member.name: M:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.ActivityExtensions.GetSpanId(System.Diagnostics.Activity)
member.summary: Gets the span unique identifier regardless of the activity identifier format.

member.name: M:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.ActivityExtensions.GetTraceId(System.Diagnostics.Activity)
member.summary: Gets the span trace unique identifier regardless of the activity identifier format.

member.name: M:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.ActivityExtensions.GetParentId(System.Diagnostics.Activity)
member.summary: Gets the span parent unique identifier regardless of the activity identifier format.

member.summary: Enrich the log event.

member.summary: extension methods.

member.summary: Enrich logger output with span information from the current .

member.name: M:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.LoggerEnrichmentConfigurationExtensions.WithSpan(Serilog.Configuration.LoggerEnrichmentConfiguration,Serilog.Enrichers.Span.SpanOptions)
member.summary: Enrich logger output with span information from the current .

member.name: T:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.SpanLogEventPropertiesNames
member.summary: Names for log event properties of span.

member.name: P:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.SpanLogEventPropertiesNames.TraceId
member.summary: Gets or sets a name for trace id property.

member.name: P:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.SpanLogEventPropertiesNames.ParentId
member.summary: Gets or sets a name for parent id property.

member.name: P:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.SpanLogEventPropertiesNames.SpanId
member.summary: Gets or sets a name for span id property.

member.name: P:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.SpanLogEventPropertiesNames.OperationName
member.summary: Gets or sets a name for operation name property.

member.name: T:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.SpanOptions
member.summary: Options.

member.name: P:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.SpanOptions.IncludeTags
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to include tags in log or not. Default is false.

member.name: P:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.SpanOptions.IncludeBaggage
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to include baggage in log or not. Default is false.

member.name: P:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.SpanOptions.IncludeOperationName
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to include operation name in log or not. Default is false.

member.name: P:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.SpanOptions.IncludeTraceFlags
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to include activity trace flags in log or not. Default is false.

member.name: P:Serilog.Enrichers.Span.SpanOptions.LogEventPropertiesNames
member.summary: Gets or sets log properties names for span.
